exercises.title: Gaussian Pulse
exercises.starterCode:

exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

def gaussian_pulse(duration, amplitude, sigma, dt=0.1):
    t = np.arange(0, duration, dt)
    center = duration / 2
    return amplitude * np.exp(-((t - center)**2) / (2 * sigma**2))

pulse = gaussian_pulse(100, 1.0, 25)
print(f"Samples: {len(pulse)}")
print(f"Max: {np.max(pulse):.3f}")
